events.event: Case auto-created by the Target Visibility Gate, promoted from candidate T-AU-2026-00099 (Forestry Corporation of NSW). Promotion required at least one independently verified source_evidence entry — see dfapti/rules/factualism-audit.md.

Manual evidence sweep found a separate, later NSW Land and Environment Court penalty: $450,000 for illegally logging protected trees in Wild Cattle Creek State Forest (June-July 2020), published 16 March 2026 - distinct from the Mogo State Forest water-pollution matter already recorded.
